log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Deep Gnome — Armored Tank's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hold Person (Level 2 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save on Young Red Dragon.
→ Young Red Dragon: WIS save [d20:10+4=14 vs DC 15] FAIL!
Young Red Dragon is paralyzed and falls! 4 falling damage. HP: 174/178
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Young Red Dragon WIS save vs Hold Person: [d20:5+4=9 vs DC 15] FAIL — still paralyzed.

Young Red Dragon attacks Deep Gnome — Armored Tank with Bite: [d20:17+10=27 vs AC 20] HIT! 23 damage. Deep Gnome — Armored Tank HP: 0/59
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 4 rounds ===
